name: 4pc Candle Tool Accessories in Brass Finish Box - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Maximize the life of your treasured candles with the help of this 4-Piece Candle Tool Accessories in Brass Finish Box from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of metal, this candle accessory set is designed in a brass finish for timeless elegance. This set includes a candle snuffer, wick trimmer, wax dipper, and a stylish storage box—everything you need for refined candle care. Plus, the storage box is adorned with a variety of diamond patterns, adding a vintage charm.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
